name: PhonePe SBI Card SELECT BLACK
exclusions: transactions excluded under PhonePe SBI Card SELECT BLACK terms
milestoneBenefits: Yatra travel voucher worth Rs 5,000 on annual spends of Rs 5 lakh
Renewal fee reversal on annual retail spends of Rs 3 lakh in previous year
additionalBenefits: PhonePe gift card worth Rs 1,500 after joining fee payment
10 Reward Points per Rs 100 on select PhonePe spends including recharges, bill payments, insurance, travel and Pincode
5 Reward Points per Rs 100 on eligible online spends
1 Reward Point per Rs 100 on other eligible spends including Scan & Pay
1 Reward Point equals Re 1 and can be redeemed as statement credit or gift vouchers on SBI Card rewards portal
4 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year, 1 per quarter
Complimentary Priority Pass membership for the first 2 card membership years
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel spends
Available on RuPay and Visa networks
